scope: single training seed and one new K=8 dev pilot after the M1h neural caller was rejected; no stress, formal validation, test, or multi-seed expansion

architecture.key: fixed normalized causal cyclic relation signature; no learned Q/K in Stage A
architecture.history_value: immutable base_context at prior proposal tokens j<t; active recalled context is never written back into history values
architecture.call_rule: continuous soft structural evidence competes with a learned bounded null similarity; no exact equality, hard threshold, top-k, index lookup, or persistence counter

checkpoint_selection: none; fixed final step 600 is the only K=8 candidate
trainable_scope: bounded null similarity plus hold/refresh LayerNorm and MLP only; fixed structural keys and all pretrained PFC, EC, place, context head, content HPC, fusion, and decoder parameters are frozen
loss: one unweighted all-token sensory cross-entropy only
forbidden_state: recursive write-back of recalled context into archival values
room, segment, path-family, return-reference, position, or place metadata
causal_contract: prediction t reads actions through t, sensory only through t-1, and archival PFC proposal tokens j<t; x_t is revealed only after prediction and then enters the existing content-HPC write

k8_pilot.force_history_call_role: diagnostic only; it cannot change the five frozen progression gates

post_result_rule: all five K=8 gates must pass before any three-seed training; otherwise stop and report without tuning on generator seed 9931
